papers.title: Genesis AI introduces GENE-26.5 model for more dexterous robot manipulation
papers.title_zh: Genesis AI introduces GENE-26.5 model for more dexterous robot manipulation
papers.tldr_zh: Genesis AI says its GENE-26.5 foundation model uses an advan
papers.cover_zh: Genesis AI says its GENE-26.5 foundation model uses an advan
papers.abstract_zh: Genesis AI says its GENE-26.5 foundation model uses an advanced data engine and a proprietary robotic hand for new levels of dexterity. The post Genesis AI introduces GENE-26.5 model for more dexterous robot manipulation appeared first on The Robot Report .

papers.title: 1X begins production of NEO humanoids in California facility
papers.title_zh: 1X begins production of NEO humanoids in California facility
papers.tldr_zh: 1X has launched full-scale production at its 'NEO factory,'
papers.cover_zh: 1X has launched full-scale production at its 'NEO factory,'
papers.abstract_zh: 1X has launched full-scale production at its 'NEO factory,' bringing vertically integrated humanoid robot manufacturing to the U.S. The post 1X begins production of NEO humanoids in California facility appeared first on The Robot Report .

papers.title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
papers.title_zh: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
papers.tldr_zh: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round
papers.cover_zh: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round
papers.abstract_zh: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing complex tasks.
